---
title: "check_pro.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/check_pro.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.05
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 3.98
overall_score: 4.41
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating main. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [google](file://google)

### Exports
- `main`
